name: Red Dead Redemption II | RPG
description:
The end of the Wild West era has begun. Civilization advances relentlessly, cornering outlaws, bounty hunters, and dreams of freedom. The era of gunfighters is coming to an end, but your story is about to begin.

The first message allows you to choose your role, from a bounty hunter, a member of the Van der Linde gang, to a private detective, it’s your choice... (I recommend using the "Time Skip").

Warning!!!: Due to the high number of tokens used, it is almost necessary to use a long-context LLM model (Like deepseek, claude, open ai etc). This is to fully enjoy the bot at 100% (Please avoid using JLLM! It doesn't work well for this type of bots).

My notes: It feels so liberating to create bots without worrying about token limits. I hope this bot wins Bot of the Year... if there were such an award XD.
creator: Ivaant20
